title: First Line of Code
description: Got into programming through Java — starting with a Minecraft server. That rabbit hole never really ended.

title: First Open Source Project
description: Built a fullstack tournament management app in Rust and React — my first real dive into both the language and open source.

title: Junior Developer at BEYONDIT GmbH
description: Started my first professional role as a developer, working on real-world fullstack projects in a team environment.

title: High School Graduation (Abitur)
description: Finished school — with coding already a bigger part of my life than most of my classes.

title: Physics Student
description: Studying physics at CAU Kiel, bridging the gap between scientific thinking and software — simulations, data analysis, and everything in between.
